changes.value:
**Files:** kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-view.test.tsx, kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx, kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx

**Error:**
```
Error: Failed to resolve import "@tanstack/react-virtual" from "src/components/column-view.tsx". Does the file exist?
```

**Also causes TypeScript errors:**
- TS2307: Cannot find module '@tanstack/react-virtual'
- TS7006: Parameter 'index' implicitly has an 'any' type (line 644)
- TS7006: Parameter 'virtualRow' implicitly has an 'any' type (line 658)

**Fix:** Run `pnpm add @tanstack/react-virtual` in kanban-app/ui, then verify tests pass and tsc --noEmit is clean.

**Pre-existing:** This failure existed before this session. The dependency is used in column-view.tsx but was never added to package.json."
Install @tanstack/react-virtual dependency to fix board-view and column-view tests
